params.toFreelancer: true = release to freelancer, false = refund to customer

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

approveCustomer().notice: Customer confirms delivery acceptance. If freelancer already approved, funds release to freelancer.

approveFreelancer().notice: Freelancer confirms delivery acceptance. If customer already approved, funds release to freelancer.

approveSystem(bool).notice: Owner (system) resolves disputes: send funds to freelancer or refund to customer.

depositPol().notice: Customer deposits POL into escrow. Caller must be the customer.

depositUsdc(uint256).notice: Customer deposits USDC into escrow. Caller must be the customer.
